## Frontend checklist

- [ ] `npm run dev` starts without errors
- [ ] `npm run build` completes without errors
- [ ] Tested in browser with MetaMask connected
- [ ] Tested with wallet disconnected (graceful fallback shown)
- [ ] No hardcoded contract addresses — using environment variables (`NEXT_PUBLIC_*`)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] Responsive — checked on mobile viewport (Chrome DevTools)
- [ ] Wallet interactions show loading state and handle errors
